mapper.insert: insert into message_record (admin_id, message_title, message_content, message_type,is_read,create_time,is_deleted) values (#{adminId}, #{messageTitle}, #{messageContent}, #{messageType},#{isRead},#{createTime},0)
mapper.update: update message_record set is_read = #{isRead}, read_time = #{readTime}, update_time = #{updateTime} where message_id = #{messageId} and is_read = 0 and is_deleted = 0
mapper.select: select message_id, admin_id, message_title, message_content, message_type, is_read, read_time, create_time from message_record where admin_id = #{adminId} and is_deleted = 0
select message_id, admin_id, message_title, message_content, message_type, is_read, read_time, create_time from message_record where admin_id = #{adminId} and is_deleted = 0 and is_read = 0
select message_id, admin_id, message_title, message_content, message_type, is_read, read_time, create_time from message_record where admin_id = #{adminId} and is_deleted = 0 and is_read = 1
mapper.delete:
delete from message_record where message_id in
#{id}
mapper.update: update message_record set is_read = 1, read_time = #{readTime} where is_read = 0 and admin_id = #{adminId} and is_deleted = 0
